programs.title: Home & Garden
programs.desc: BBC Home & Garden provides home renovation shows, interior design makeovers, and garden transformation programming. It features British lifestyle content focused on property upgrades, DIY projects, and creative home improvement ideas.

programs.title: Home Away from Home
programs.desc: Families from Falmouth and Wiltshire swap homes with strangers to travel around the UK.
